accepted.reason: Becke weighting with pairwise distances and smooth partition functions is a strong numerical kernel.
Linear two-pointer scan over sorted points/regions is a compact and practical interval matching kernel.
Gating dynamics with exponential Euler updates provide realistic scientific simulation loops.
Stencil-based Laplacian and thresholding are canonical image-processing kernels for optimization.
Index remapping accumulation and CFL-based partitioning are clear array-kernel transformations.
K-means assignment/update loops with weighted centers are robust clustering optimization examples.
Recursive BERT term encode/decode logic with datetime/regex handling is a high-signal data-serialization example.
Small control-flow casting edge case is useful as a concise language-semantics example.
Group collapsing and interpolation over monotonic grids provide valuable numerical pre-processing kernels.

skipped.reason: Large pointer-heavy Hopcroft-Karp implementation with extensive low-level memory management is deferred for dedicated curation.
